title: Support covergroup coverpoint bins with sample() and get_inst_coverage() (#7099)

features.name: covergroup declaration with type option
features.description: Code should include a covergroup declaration with type option and iff condition clause
features.snippet: covergroup cg_t @(posedge clk) option.per_instance = 1; coverpoint cp_var { bins b1 = {1}; } endgroup

features.name: coverpoint with explicit value bins
features.description: Code should include a coverpoint with explicit value bins using curly brace range syntax
features.snippet: coverpoint cp_var { bins b1 = {1}; bins b2 = {2}; bins b3 = {3}; bins b4 = {4}; }

features.name: covergroup sample method invocation
features.description: Code should include a covergroup instance sample() method call to trigger coverage sampling

features.name: covergroup get_inst_coverage method invocation
features.description: Code should include a covergroup instance get_inst_coverage() method call to query coverage percentage

features.name: covergroup instance construction and type parameterization
features.description: Code should include a parameterized covergroup type instantiation with new() constructor
features.snippet: covergroup cg_t(int n) @(posedge clk); coverpoint cp { bins b[] = {[0:n-1]}; } endgroup : cg_t cg = new(4);

features.name: covergroup option per_instance control
features.description: Code should include a covergroup with option.per_instance set to control per-instance vs cross-coverage
features.snippet: covergroup cg @(posedge clk); option.per_instance = 1; coverpoint cp; endgroup

features.name: covergroup iff reserved keyword guard
features.description: Code should include a covergroup with iff clause to conditionally sample based on a guard expression
features.snippet: covergroup cg @(posedge clk) iff (enable); coverpoint cp { bins b = {1}; } endgroup
